name: Daily Revenue Sync
description: Syncs revenue data from all payment gateways.

name: FX Rate Update
description: Updates foreign exchange rates from the central bank API.

name: Employee Attendance Pull
description: Pulls daily attendance records from HR system.

name: Weekly Invoice Generator
description: Generates and sends weekly invoices to clients.

name: Failed Transaction Retry
description: Attempts to re-process failed transactions from the last 24 hours.

name: Database Backup
description: Performs a full backup of the production database.
